{{Quote|Those fools don't understand whom they are dealing with!|Torpin|<ref name="RM" />}}
'''Torpin''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
A short, stout man, Torpin became a [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] despite never having served in the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]], and commanded no respect from his subordinates. He was one of the two Moffs with territories bordering [[Maelstrom Nebula/Legends|the Maelstrom]]. Along with his compatriot, Moff [[Vanko]], Torpin submitted falsified budgets and financial reports to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to try and hide the fact that he was losing a great deal of money and resources to the [[Riders of the Maelstrom]], a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] group operating in the Maelstrom. He and Vanko met in secret on board the [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']], to discuss what their next moves would be. Both believed that the pirates were in league with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], and were planning a major offensive against them. The ''Kuari Princess'' was [[Attack on the Kuari Princess|hijacked]] by the Riders.<ref name="RM" />

==Appearances==
*[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] {{Reprint|Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)}} {{1st}}
